content:
🚀 VSRFI-ComfyUI | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To upscale and enhance the frame rate of long videos within the ComfyUI environment, overcoming memory limitations.
✨ Key Features: • Video Super Resolution using Flash VSR • Frame Interpolation with GIMM-VFI, RIFE, or FILM • Smart Tile Processing for VRAM optimization • Stream Processing for arbitrary video lengths • Automatic model downloads
📖 Summary: This ComfyUI custom node enhances video processing by combining Video Super Resolution (VSR) with Frame Interpolation (VFI). It supports arbitrary video lengths through smart tiling and stream processing, allowing for memory-efficient upscaling and frame rate doubling.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
